description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 3 times, applies [Grievous Wound] stacks 1, and increases Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4 sec.

For 7 sec, increases all allies’ ATK by 393*(1+0.3*Skill Level) and Physical Evasion by [150->300], and grants self [Breath of Death] for 7 sec. [Breath of Death] : Attack Speed increases by 30%, damage dealt to enemies increases by 25%, and all Physical Attacks are evaded.

Moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, consuming all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target and dealing additional Physical DMG per 1 stack consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter]. Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 20 times.

Critical Rate increases by [(added) 300]. Every 10 sec, when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals Physical DMG 6 times, with a [65%->50%] chance per hit to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1. [Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

dark.unified: Normal Attack damage increases by 115% for the duration. [(removed) Increases Attack Speed of all allies by 10% for the duration.]

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000 and damage increases by 100%. [(removed) When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.]

dark.unified: On each hit, reduces the target's Mana by [(added) 150]. [(removed) Roi’s Critical Rate increases by 360.]
On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by [24%->300%] and Critical Damage by [48%->60%] for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.
